loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD compliance and H5/H7 current harmonics — voltage THD, flicker, and crest factor are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD historical trajectories — per-phase voltage harmonics (h5/h7) and scalar axis limits are not measured by this meter.
